title: Open the app and navigate to the pregnancy calendar view
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view
expected_result: The pregnancy calendar view is displayed

title: Verify the current week of pregnancy is displayed correctly
preconditions: The current week of pregnancy is 6
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Verify the current week of pregnancy is displayed as 6
expected_result: The current week of pregnancy is displayed as 6

title: Check the fetal development images
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Verify the four images representing different stages of fetal development are displayed
expected_result: The four images representing different stages of fetal development are displayed

title: Input and verify the weight field
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Click on the weight field | Input '10 lbs' | Verify the weight field is updated to '10 lbs'
expected_result: The weight field is updated to '10 lbs'

title: Input and verify the length field
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Click on the length field | Input '10 cm' | Verify the length field is updated to '10 cm'
expected_result: The length field is updated to '10 cm'

title: Input and verify the normal fetal heart rate field
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Click on the normal fetal heart rate field | Input '120 bpm' | Verify the normal fetal heart rate field is updated to '120 bpm'
expected_result: The normal fetal heart rate field is updated to '120 bpm'

title: Input and verify the normal hCG field
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Click on the normal hCG field | Input '1000 mIU/mL' | Verify the normal hCG field is updated to '1000 mIU/mL'
expected_result: The normal hCG field is updated to '1000 mIU/mL'

title: Input and verify the term of pregnancy field
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the pregnancy calendar view | Click on the term of pregnancy field | Input '38 weeks' | Verify the term of pregnancy field is updated to '38 weeks'
expected_result: The term of pregnancy field is updated to '38 weeks'
